reference: OASIS holds the older 47QFRA22F0009 contract era deliverables across multiple A-numbered families (A009 monthly status, A013 SEMP, A031 IMS, A006 IATP). IGSCC holds the newer FA881525FB002 contract era deliverables. Both subtrees coexist under 1.0 enterprise program DM - Restricted/, deliberately separating contract eras while keeping the same A-numbered CDRL family layout inside each.
reference_contexts: 1.0 enterprise program DM - Restricted/OASIS/A013 - System Engineering Plan (SEMP)/47QFRA22F0009_IGSI-2431_enterprise program_Systems_Engineering_Management_Plan_2024-08-28.pdf
1.0 enterprise program DM - Restricted/IGSCC/A013 - System Engineering Plan (SEMP)/FA881525FB002_IGSCC-126_IGS-System-Engineering-Plan_A013_Updated.pdf
rationale: Final closing semantic question. Cross-subtree conceptual question on the OASIS vs IGSCC organizational split inside the same DM tree. Closes the 400-query corpus on a cross-subtree comparison.
corpus_grounding_evidence: Anchor: folders probe --like '%A013%' returned A013 deliverables under both OASIS (47QFRA22F0009 era IGSI-66 and IGSI-2431) and IGSCC (FA881525FB002 era IGSCC-126) subtrees of 1.0 enterprise program DM - Restricted, suggesting deliberate contract-era separation.
